command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
# Get the EXACT secret the running gateway is using (from its env via /proc)
echo "=== Secret the RUNNING gateway process actually has ==="
GWPID=$(pgrep -f "hermes_cli.main gateway" | head -1)
echo "gateway PID: $GWPID"
RUNNING_SECRET=$(sudo tr '\0' '\n' < /proc/$GWPID/environ 2>/dev/null | grep TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET | cut -d= -f2)
echo "running secret: $RUNNING_SECRET"

echo ""
echo "=== Secret in service file ==="
SVC_SECRET=$(grep TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET /etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service | grep -oE '[a-f0-9]{64}')
echo "service file secret: $SVC_SECRET"

echo ""
echo "=== Do they match? ==="
[ "$RUNNING_SECRET" = "$SVC_SECRET" ] && echo "MATCH" || echo "MISMATCH - running process has different secret!"

echo ""
echo "=== Now DELETE webhook and re-register with the RUNNING secret exactly ==="
curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/deleteWebhook?drop_pending_updates=true" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print('deleted:', json.load(sys.stdin).get('ok'))"
sleep 3
curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/setWebhook" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "{\"url\":\"https://sakura.cutegrafiks.com/telegram\",\"secret_token\":\"$RUNNING_SECRET\"}" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('re-registered:', d.get('ok'), d.get('description'))"

echo ""
echo "=== Now send REAL telegram message and check ==="
LB=$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log)
sleep 3
curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/sendMessage" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"chat_id":"-1003934415467","text":"AFTER REREGISTER 0xBEEF - Sakura reply online"}' >/dev/null
echo "sent, waiting 40s..."
sleep 40
echo "=== gateway.log new inbound ==="
tail -n +$((LB+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "inbound|response ready" | tail -5
echo "(if 0xBEEF inbound appears, THE SECRET MISMATCH WAS THE BUG - now fixed)"
REMOTE
